rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE A PRICE 1991 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Declaratory Relief, Expungement Of Liens, Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Order Directing Return Of Promissory Note
rulings.Rulings: Kendall Price's Motion for Declaratory Relief is DENIED. Code of Civil Procedurs section 1060 requires an origial action. This matter may not be brought as a motion. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who disagrees with the tentative ruling and wishes to argue the matter must notify the Court at (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 10/22/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE A PRICE 1991 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Successor Trustee For Order For Entry Of Judgment On Promissory Note Due To Breach Of Settlement Agreement By Respondents And For Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Successor Trustee's Motion for Judgment on Promissory Note and for attorney fees and costs is GRANTED. In ruling on a motion under Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6, the Court may determine the motion on declarations alone. (Corkland v. Boscoe (1984) 156 Cal.App.3d 989, 994.) The settlement agreement provided that Kendall Price was to timely make all payments for mortgages and real estate taxes on the subject property. The declarations submitted by successor trustee establish that Kendall Price failed to make those payments and the subject property is now in foreclosure. Request for attorney fees and costs in the amount of $44,340.00 is GRANTED. No opposition. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who disagress with the tentative ruling and wishes to argue the matter must notify the Court at (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 10/22/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE A PRICE 1991 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Successor Trustee's Application for Right to Attach and Motion for Order for Attachment and Writ of Attachment are DENIED. If the action is against a defendant who is a natural person, an attachment may be issued only on a claim which arises out of the conduct by the defendant of a trade, business, or profession. (C.C.P. section 483.010(c).) Kendall Price acting as trustee for his mother's trust, was not engaged in a "trade, business, or profession" pursuant to Section 483.010. The Temporary Protective Order entered October 8, 2013 is dissolved. Prevailing party to prepare the orders. Any party who disagrees with the tentative ruling and wishes to argue the matter must notify the Court at (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 10/22/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE A PRICE 1991 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Applicants For Order For Attachment And Writ Of Attachment On Order Shortening Time
rulings.Rulings: Successor Trustee's Application for Right to Attach and Motion for Order for Attachment and Writ of Attachment are DENIED. If the action is against a defendant who is a natural person, an attachment may be issued only on a claim which arises out of the conduct by the defendant of a trade, business, or profession. (C.C.P. section 483.010(c).) Kendall Price, acting as trustee for his mother's trust, was not engaged in a "trade, business, or profession" pursuant to Section 483.010. The Temporary Protective Order entered on October 8, 2003 is dissolved. Prevailing party to prepare orders. Any party who disagrees with the tentative rulings and wishes to argue the matters must notify the Court at (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 10/22/13.
